published_title_visible: 26. Harry Leary “was always helpful to everybody” - “even kids” - “never rude or anything” - “he lived it”
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - Harry Leary was always helpful to everyone
working_source_description: Harry Leary was always helpful to everyone, even kids. He was also an avid mentor and a woman once reached out to tell Kyle that Harry was her daughter’s best friend. Her daughter turned out to be about 8 years old - Kyle sent her the jersey Harry was wearing in the picture that was originally shared with him.
